description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 9 hrs 8 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 26 mins per day. His time was split across five projects, with most activity in Java, plus work in Other, Markdown, TypeScript, and JSON. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
